data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for walk-up QR booking.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the walk-up QR booking feature, but there is no direct evidence provided that confirms this functionality is implemented or operational. The linked use case mentions the need for walk-up QR booking, yet the prior steps do not include any evidence of this feature being tested or validated. Therefore, the requirement cannot be conclusively assessed based on the available information.
gaps: No evidence of walk-up QR booking functionality being validated.
